name: core
description: A framework helps you quickly build AI Native IDE products. MCP Client, supports Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools via MCP server.

findings_summary.reassessment_reason: SecM audit: all injection/obfuscation findings are false positives (test files, documentation, vendored JS, security tools). Safety overrides bypassed per PM approval.

agent_a.comment: Docs quality 9/10. README present. 12 features, 4 permissions claimed.

agent_b.comment: 3176 files analyzed. Found: 46 network, 34 file, 15 env, 3 system calls. Primary: typescript.

agent_c_star.comment: 985 findings: 0 critical, 246 high, 218 medium, 521 low. Obfuscation detected!. No injection.

agent_d.comment: Score 0. 0 mismatches. Risk: critical. Safety overrides: applied.

agent_e.comment: Rejected. Confidence 90%. Deterministic override: high-risk obfuscation detected.

agent_audit.manager_summary: 5/5 agents completed. Score: 0/100, Risk: critical. 0 mismatches, 985 scanner findings. Rejected at 90% confidence. Safety overrides triggered.
